prompt: A cinematic dark landing page mockup for a Japanese-inspired creative agency called AKAI STUDIO, shown inside a modern desktop browser window. The page uses a dramatic black-to-deep-red gradient background with a moody sunset glow, scattered small white dust or ash particles, and a widescreen hero layout. On the right side, place a full-body samurai seen from behind, standing on jagged black rocks near a calm shoreline, wearing dark layered armor and a horned helmet, holding a katana at his side, with a long torn crimson cape blowing strongly to the right. On the left side, create bold oversized white condensed sans-serif headline text in Spanish reading DISEÑO BRUTAL, split across two stacked lines. Above it, add a small eyebrow line with a tiny red vertical accent: DISEÑO QUE DEJA HUELLA. Below the headline, add large Japanese characters followed by STUDIO: 赤い侍 STUDIO. Beneath that, place a short supporting paragraph in small uppercase white text: BRANDING, WEB DESIGN Y EXPERIENCIAS DIGITALES PARA MARCAS QUE QUIEREN DESTACAR.. Add two call-to-action buttons below the copy: a filled light button labeled "VER PROYECTOS" and an outlined dark button labeled "CONTACTAR". Across the top navigation bar, include exactly 4 centered menu items in uppercase: "INICIO", "SERVICIOS", "PROYECTOS", "CONTACTO", with "INICIO" marked as active using a small red underline. Put a boxed top-right button labeled HABLEMOS. In the top-left of the site header, add a logo block with a small red square containing the kanji "赤", the brand name "AKAI STUDIO", and a tiny Japanese subtitle beneath it. The overall style should feel like high-end brutalist web design meets cinematic game key art: ultra-polished UI mockup, sharp typography, strong contrast, luxury agency aesthetic, minimal but powerful composition, black, white, and crimson palette, subtle grain, realistic lighting, premium presentation.
